title: GoC G9B Evaluator B declaration
description: Structured declaration for Evaluator B scoring pass. Per docs/plans/PLAN_G9B_REAL_INDEPENDENT_EVALUATOR_B.md §5, pre_scoring_visibility_statement is normatively mandatory for new submissions (exactly what B was/was not allowed to see before raw scoring). visibility_before_scoring may carry the same text if preferred. task_b_independence_class is set only after Task B review (§11): strict_blind | documented_exception | contaminated.

pre_scoring_visibility_statement.description: Mandatory for new Evaluator B packages: explicit record of visibility before raw scoring (A matrix, A rationales, deltas, etc.).

visibility_before_scoring.description: Optional alias for pre_scoring_visibility_statement; at least one of the two must be non-empty for PLAN_G9B compliance.

task_b_independence_class.description: Assigned during repo Task B review only.
